title: rubus formosensis
intro: Rubus formosensis is a species of bramble that is native to Taiwan and is commonly known as the Taiwan raspberry. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Rubus formosensis include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Rubus formosensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy for various health issues.
